name: Active Rentals
query:
SELECT
         b.name AS "Booking:Link/Car Rental Booking:140",
         b.customer_name AS "Customer:Data:160",
         b.vehicle AS "Vehicle:Link/Rental Vehicle:130",
         b.pickup_datetime AS "Pickup:Datetime:150",
         b.dropoff_datetime AS "Drop-off:Datetime:150",
         b.status AS "Status:Data:100",
         b.grand_total AS "Total:Currency:110",
         b.outstanding_amount AS "Outstanding:Currency:120"
       FROM `tabCar Rental Booking` b
       WHERE b.docstatus = 1 AND b.status IN ('Confirmed', 'Active')
       ORDER BY b.dropoff_datetime ASC
